Class TransformersEmbeddingModelProperties

java.lang.Object
org.springframework.ai.model.transformers.autoconfigure.TransformersEmbeddingModelProperties
@ConfigurationProperties("spring.ai.embedding.transformer") public class TransformersEmbeddingModelProperties extends Object
Configuration properties for the Transformer Embedding model.
Author:
Christian Tzolov
